species: The non-pathogenic yeast Starmerella bombicola CGMCC 1576 is an efficient producer of sophorolipids (SLs).
sample_source: the fermentation broth of S. bombicola under different nitrogen source conditions.
cell_line: the protein Sapl1 encoded by the sapl1 gene with the highest expression level among the four sapl genes under ammonium sulfate conditions was heterologously expressed and purified in P. pastoris GS115.
strain: Starmerella bombicola CGMCC 1576 is an efficient producer of sophorolipids (SLs).
